name: Classic Burger
description: Juicy beef patty with lettuce, tomato, and cheese.

name: Grilled Steak
description: Tender ribeye grilled to perfection. Quantities are limited!

name: Caesar Salad
description: Fresh romaine with parmesan and croutons.

name: Loaded Fries
description: Crispy fries topped with cheese and bacon.

name: Grilled Chicken
description: Marinated chicken breast on the grill.

name: Chocolate Cake
description: Rich chocolate cake with vanilla frosting.

name: Fried Mushrooms
description: Crispy fried mushrooms served with dipping sauce.

name: Cheesecake
description: Creamy cheesecake with berry topping. Todd's own recipe!

name: Lasagna
description: Layers of pasta, meat sauce, and cheese.

name: Fresh Wrigglers
description: Live bait for fishing, perfect for catching the big ones.  You probably don't want to eat these.  At least I wouldn't.

name: Fresh Minnows
description: Live minnows great for bait or 'eatin' - catch your dinner or bait your hook!
